titleStmt.title: SII 8.458: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 458. (A.R. No. 163 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyil ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi miṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara vikkaṇaṉ ciṅkaṇaṉ melkaṭal pāyat tikkaṉaittilum taṉ cakkaranaṭātti
vijaiya Aviṣekam paṇṇi virasiṁ [hāsana]ttup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟ[ ṟirun=ta ruḷiya] kovirājakecaripanma rāṉa cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 24Āvatu Irājarājappāṇṭināṭṭu muṭikoṇṭacoḻavaḷanā
ṭṭup parān=ta kavaḷanāṭṭu brahmade yam ciṅkaccaturvvedi maṅkalattu ma hāsa- [ bh Aiyo] m muttūṟṟukkūṟṟattuk kappalūrāṉa Ulakaḷan=ta coḻanallūr colaicaṭakopaṉāṉa vāṉavaṉ viḻupparaiyar vaitta taṇṇīrpan=ta lppuṟamā
ka nāṅkaḷ Ivaṉukku viṟṟukkuṭutta vatu kiḻpiṭākai paṭutaramaṅkalattuk kāṉa karaicceytapaṭi Iraṇṭu Aḷavupaṭi nilam Orumāvum Ivvūr vaṭapaṭākai kuṇama- ntra nallūrk karuñcey colai kurumaṇi paṟṟunilam pattumā
vum kārinakkalukkup poṉa peruvaḻikku ṟku Ivar vaitta taṇṇīrppan=ta l Uṭpaṭa nilam muṉṟu māvum taṇṇīrppan=ta lukkut taṇṇīr koḷḷuṅ kiṇaṟum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟu vilaikalañceytu kuṭuttom Ivvūr ma hāsabhai yom colai caṭakopa
ṉāṉa vāṉavaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉukku Ipparicu viṟṟukkuṭutta bhū mikkum kiṇaṟṟukkum Emmilicain=ta vilaipporuḷukkum Innilattukku Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum Iṟukkakkaṭava Iṟai nāṅkaḷ kaṭavomākavum sammati ttukkoṇṭa tiramam nūṟṟaiñcuṅ kaiyile Aṟakkoṇṭu paṭutaramaṅkalattu
kāṉkaraiccey taṭiyiṉāl Aḷavupaṭi nilam Orumāvukkum kuṇaman=ti ranallūrk karuñcey nilam pattumāvukkum taṇṇīrppan=ta lukku taṇṇīrkoḷḷuṅ kiṇaṟṟukkum taṇṇīrppan=ta l Uṭpaṭa nila muṉṟumāvukkum Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum Iṟai yiṟukkakakaṭavomāka sammati ttu Iṟait
tirappiyamum vilaittirappiyamuṅ kaiyile Aṟakkoṇṭu peruvariñyu cilvariyum Epp(o)ṟpaṭṭitum candrādi ttavarai nāṅkaḷe yiṟuppatākavum samma tittu viṟṟu vilaikalañ ceytukuṭuttom Ivvūr ma hāsabhai yom colai caṭakopaṉāṉa vāṉavaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉu
kku . Iṟaikkum Urāyaṉṟeṉṉiṟ poṉ Aimpatiṉkaḻaiñcum ṉ Aṉṟeṉiṟ poṉaiṅkaḻaiñcum Aṉṟāḻ kovukku taṇṭamum Iṟuttu Ibhūmi candrā titta(l)vaṟ nilainiṟutti Iṟai celutta samma tittom Ivvūr ma hāsabhai- yom .
Digital edition of SII 8.458 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
